title: Modular Arithmetic Witnesses

solver_reuse.target: modular inverse, CRT, and fixed-width residue regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Nonunit inverse obstructions where 2*b - 6*k = 1 has no integer solution because gcd(2,6) does not divide 1 and where the fixed-width search b < 6 cannot satisfy (2*b) mod 6 = 1, an incompatible CRT obstruction where 4*a - 6*b = 1 has no integer solution because gcd(4,6) does not divide 1, plus a fixed-width residue search proving no modulo-5 unit violates a^4 = 1.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional modular arithmetic rows only when they add distinct divisibility, CRT, fixed-width residue, or finite-field solver pressure; keep deeper number-theory theorems in Lean-horizon resources.

graduation_criteria: Encode each check as deterministic Bool/BV or LIA formulas.
Replay all SAT witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Keep the promoted Diophantine and QF_BV obstructions tied to source artifacts, checked certificate regressions, and tamper-rejection learner coverage before claiming proof-object coverage.
Keep adding checked proof evidence for UNSAT finite-search claims only when the fixed modulus, residue width, or integer obstruction is part of the lesson.
Promote related finite-field examples into finite-fields-v0.
